companions.name: Vaeril
companions.title: Shield of the Grove
companions.description: A steadfast Bloomguard warrior who believes in duty above all else. His ironbark shield has turned aside a thousand blows.
companions.personality: Stoic, protective, quietly humorous. Values honor and keeping promises.

companions.name: Sylor
companions.title: Shadow of Thorns
companions.description: A cunning Thornbinder who walks the line between justice and revenge. Quick with a blade and quicker with words.
companions.personality: Sarcastic, clever, fiercely loyal once trust is earned. Distrusts authority.

companions.name: Aeliana
companions.title: Voice of the Coven
companions.description: An Emerald Coven mystic with a gift for healing and an insatiable curiosity about the Sap's mysteries.
companions.personality: Warm, intellectual, morally principled. Struggles between knowledge-seeking and caution.

companions.name: Mycon
companions.title: The Living Network
companions.description: A Sporecaller who is slowly merging with the fungal networks beneath the Verdance. Their insights are alien but invaluable.
companions.personality: Detached, cryptic, surprisingly empathetic. Speaks of "we" instead of "I" sometimes.

companions.name: Kaelen
companions.title: Warden of the Wild
companions.description: A Wildkin Ranger who has bonded with a ghostly hawk spirit. They see the world through the eyes of nature itself.
companions.personality: Quiet, observant, deeply connected to nature. Speaks more to animals than people.
